Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The goal is to create a process mining event log from the provided ERP tables The event log should have Case ID order_id Activity Name descriptive name Timestamp date time Resource Actor who performed the activity Other Attributes

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Tables given Orders Table Order Lines Table Delivery Table Invoice Table Payments Table Products Table Resources Table

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Steps 1 Extract Order Created events from Orders Table Timestamp order_date Resource sales person id Attributes customer id customer type order priority

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2 Extract Item Picked events from Order Lines Table Timestamp item picking date Resource picker id Attributes item id quantity Note one event per item line

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 3 Extract Order Dispatched and Order Arrived events from Delivery Table Timestamp delivery dispatch date and delivery arrival date Resource carrier id Attributes delivery id delivery note

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 4 Extract Invoice Issued events from Invoice Table Timestamp invoice issue date Resource billing person id Attributes invoice id invoice amount

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 5 Extract Payment Received events from Payments Table Need to link payment id to order id via invoice id Timestamp payment date Resource Can leave blank or Customer payment method Attributes payment id payment method payment reference

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets process each order

Text: Order 1001 Orders 2024 01 01T09 00 00Z Order Created SP 001 Order Lines 2024 01 02T10 15 00Z Item Picked WH 001 item id ITEM 001 qty 2 2024 01 02T11 00 00Z Item Picked WH 002 item id ITEM 002 qty 1 Delivery 2024 01 03T08 30 00Z Order Dispatched CR 01 delivery id DLV 5001 2024 01 05T14 45 00Z Order Arrived CR 01 delivery id DLV 5001 Invoice 2024 01 06T09 00 00Z Invoice Issued BL 001 invoice id INV 1001 amount 250 Payment PAY 2001 for INV 1001 order 1001 2024 01 10T11 30 00Z Payment Received Credit Card payment id PAY 2001

Text: Order 1005 Orders 2024 01 05T08 45 00Z Order Created SP 001 Order Lines 2024 01 06T09 30 00Z Item Picked WH 003 item id ITEM 007 qty 10 2024 01 06T09 45 00Z Item Picked WH 002 item id ITEM 002 qty 2 Delivery DLV 5005 2024 01 07T10 15 00Z Order Dispatched CR 02 2024 01 09T11 45 00Z Order Arrived CR 02 Invoice INV 1005 2024 01 10T09 30 00Z Invoice Issued BL 003 amount 500 Payment PAY 2005 INV 1005 1005 2024 01 15T12 00 00Z Payment Received Credit Card

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait are there any other events What about Invoice Paid The prompt says Payment Received from Payments table

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets organize the output table columns Case ID order id Activity Name Timestamp Resource can use resource id mapped to name if possible Other Attributes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill use Resource ID and map to Resource Name

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets review the chronological order per case 1001 OK 1002 OK 1003 OK 1004 OK 1005 OK

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Assumptions to document Payment Received attributes the action to the Customer since the Payments table lacks an internal resource ID for payees

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The resource IDs have been enriched with the resource names and roles from the optional Resources table for better readability but original IDs are also retained in the attributes

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Looking at order 1002 Invoice Issued and Order Arrived This is perfectly chronological

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Resource mapping SP 001 Alice Brown Sales Person SP 002 Bob Smith Sales Person SP 003 Charlie Kim Sales Person WH 001 David Lin Warehouse Staff WH 002 Eva Johnson Warehouse Staff WH 003 Frank Miller Warehouse Staff CR 01 GlobalTransport Carrier CR 02 FastShip Carrier CR 03 AirExpress Carrier BL 001 Gina Carter Billing Clerk BL 002 Harry Lee Billing Clerk BL 003 Irene Park Billing Clerk

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In Payments table invoice id links to Invoice table which links to order id All match correctly

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Since attributes vary by event type I can use a single string column for Other Attributes formatted as key value pairs

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I should ensure the markdown table is nicely formatted The columns requested Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Resource Actor Other Attributes

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Item Picked is modeled as an individual event for each order line to preserve the precise timestamp and specific warehouse resource for each item Summarizing them into a single Items Picked event per order would result in the loss of granular timestamp and resource data

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deliveries are split into two distinct events Order Dispatched and Order Arrived to reflect the dispatch and arrival milestones accurately Split deliveries for Order 1002 result in multiple pairs of these events

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Order 1004 the process is incomplete in the dataset no delivery invoice or payment records exist Only events with available timestamps are included missing future events are not artificially generated

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This covers all bases The solution is well structured clear and directly answers the prompt
